description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 14, 2025 at 4:01 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in Mountain View, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Logue Avenue at E. Middlefield Road. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling south on Logue Avenue and came to a stop at a red light in the dedicated right turn lane  at the intersection 
with E. Middlefield Road. The Waymo AV proceeded from the stop line, and then came to a stop again before entering the E. Middlefield 
Road. A passenger car that was making a right turn directly behind the Waymo AV continued forward and the front of the passenger car 
made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. The passenger car sustained damage. 
 
Waymo is reporting this crash under Request No. 2 of Standing General Order 2021-01. Waymo may supplement or correct its reporting 
with additional information as it may become available. 
Print
Clear Form
